title: AttendanceEvent
description: Immutable, append-only attendance scan or override tied to a class session. White paper §9.2, §15. Integrity is policy-based (count reconciliation), not software-enforced.

id.description: UUIDv7, minted at scan time (works offline).

revision.description: Idempotency key; replayed events are no-ops.

session_id.description: The class session (class + subject/period + date/time) this scan belongs to.

scanned_at.description: Device local time of the scan/override.

source.description: manual_override is the default-on path for a present-but-cardless student and MUST carry a void_reason explaining it.

status.description: present = recorded; void = voided-with-reason. Never edited, only added or voided.

void_reason.description: Required when status is 'void' or when source is 'manual_override' (audit trail for overrides).
